race.description: Stylish Events And Hire Mdn Plate
race.comment: ATOMIC TIME (4) has hit the frame in both runs since joining the new stable and looks to be working up to a maiden victory. Drawn to get all the favours from the inside alley and should give backers a sight up on speed. Will prove very hard to toss. MALBEC MAN (1) has placed six of seven overall and will strip fitter second-up from the break. Sure to play a major role in the outcome. JETHRO (8) gets 2kg weight relief with the claim and will be better with that first-up run now in the locker. Top-three candidate. ALL BANGED UP (3) placed at Beaudesert when facing the starter for the first time and will have derived a stack of benefit from that day at the races. Watch for further improvement. REMEMBER THE BOYS (2) rounds out the selections.
